description_long: This is a large, vintage-style wooden cabinet with a two-tiered structure. The upper section features three glass-paneled doors with ornate trim, revealing two spacious wooden shelves inside. The lower section consists of three solid doors with matching decorative molding, likely concealing additional storage compartments. The cabinet is painted in a muted beige color with a darker wood top separating the upper and lower sections, and it stands on short, curved legs. The back of the cabinet is made of plain, unpainted wood panels, contrasting with the more decorative front and sides. The overall design suggests it is both functional and decorative, suitable for storing and displaying items in a home, shop, or public urban space.
description: A large, vintage beige wooden cabinet with glass-paneled upper doors and solid lower doors, featuring ornate trim and a contrasting wood back.
description_view_0: Front view showing three glass-paneled upper doors, three solid lower doors, and ornate trim details.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's depth, flat side panels, and the separation between upper and lower sections.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing plain, unpainted wooden panels without any doors or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's profile and construction details.
